authority_bundle.conflict_policy: domain owner wins; contradictory generated projection is defective

keyword_model.identifier_classification_law: ordinary_identifiers is the disjoint union of the two category lists; membership never creates a keyword, intrinsic token kind, parser hook, resolver namespace, checker intrinsic, or formatter special case
keyword_model.quoted_word_terminal: Exact lexeme match; lexer may emit a hard token or IDENTIFIER with contextual role metadata.

current_surface_decisions.hash_role_trivia: allowed by parser; formatter canonicalizes to attached #word
current_surface_decisions.value_absence: ::none or Option<T>::none; Option::none is only a contextual enum-pattern under an already known Option scrutinee, not a value constructor; null is recovery only
current_surface_decisions.named_rest_disambiguation: grammar owner: attached suffix *** in parameter/type; attached prefix ** only in call/materialization unfold
current_surface_decisions.member_visibility_hash: hierarchy-protected: declaring type and nominal subclasses only
current_surface_decisions.message_spawn: ordinary MessageSuffix selector reserved semantically by HIR
current_surface_decisions.single_guard_clause: at most one if/!if GuardClause per guard owner; GuardChain removed

boundary_policies.commit: match followed immediately in grammar by {, subject supplied by preceding loop

boundary_policies.postfix: A^ with no trivia before caret and no RHS
boundary_policies.infix: a ^ b with trivia on both sides

boundary_policies.note: This is a Frontend/formatter boundary policy, not a Grammar semantic production. Comments are rehomed before compaction.

input_supply_policy.forbidden: Do not model omission as a global optional; only the owning context may supply an implicit input.

control_transfer.break: one or more break words + optional value + optional single GuardClause
control_transfer.continue: zero or more break words + continue + optional single GuardClause

admission_policies.typed_pattern: Pattern children use Identifier : TypeRef; a local BindingPattern owns one optional whole-pattern TypeAnnotation while excluding a second top-level TypedBindingPattern derivation; callable parameters use ParameterPatternSlot = Identifier and never reinterpret a refutable Pattern into a public signature

slice_index.missing_bound_recovery: use ^ or $ for the first or last logical coordinate

scanner.nested_block_comment: positive dash-run closes innermost comment; opener/closer dash counts need not match
scanner.interpolation_owner: scanner owns mode boundary; parser owns InterpolationPath CST

raw_string_phase_a.cst_body: exact source scalar sequence between delimiters

multiline_string_phase_a.indentation: strip longest exact common indentation prefix; tab and space are distinct

ScannerMultilineStringLiteral.indent: strip the longest exact common indentation prefix; tab and space are distinct
ScannerMultilineStringLiteral.mir: ConstString for plain content; ordered RenderParts for interpolation

ScannerRecoveryOperatorSymbol.context: only after a declaration-entry parser has committed to exact contextual lexeme operator
ScannerRecoveryOperatorSymbol.termination: trivia, precedence contextual lexeme, or StatementBoundary

lowering_and_semantic_responsibility.cst: all tokens/trivia, missing/unexpected tokens, source form, supply-policy IDs
lowering_and_semantic_responsibility.ast: normalized syntax meaning and stage-specific semantic enums
lowering_and_semantic_responsibility.hir: generated declarations; property/forwarding/comprehension/loop normalization; actor/protocol ownership; structured task scope; and reserved `~ spawn` message recognition
lowering_and_semantic_responsibility.mir: canonical Deeplus semantic authority: evaluation order, control targets, cleanup, ownership, effects, cancellation, failure, actor/task state, evidence, xVM/LLVM lowering
lowering_and_semantic_responsibility.formatter: canonical spacing and comments; # role compacting is convention

rightward_local_binding.cst: RightwardLocalBindingCst preserves arrow, sigil, annotation and trivia
rightward_local_binding.ast_hir: normalize before checking to ordinary immutable/mutable local binding
rightward_local_binding.mir: no flow-binding node; ordinary local initialization and commit only
rightward_local_binding.evaluation: initializer exactly once; name not in scope until successful commit
rightward_local_binding.yield_response_boundary: yield remains a suspension/resume event; resumed response binding then uses ordinary local binding

empty_index_suffix.context: after an admitted postfix receiver only

custom_operator_declaration.context: declaration entry after exact contextual operator lexeme only; ScannerRecoveryOperatorSymbol is recovery-only

diagnostics.fix: declared first coordinate/key; [*] only for NumericArray

contextual_prefix_sign_adapter.required_context: one independently fixed exact Int, IntN, or UIntN domain; ISize/USize excluded
contextual_prefix_sign_adapter.candidate: negative of the validated token magnitude
contextual_prefix_sign_adapter.admission: candidate is mathematically representable in the exact target domain

numeric_lexical_policy.unsuffixed_integer_contextual_targets: representable Int, IntN, or UIntN for N in {8,16,32,64,128} only
numeric_lexical_policy.unsuffixed_integer_excluded_contextual_t: ISize and USize require isize/usize or explicit checked conversion
numeric_lexical_policy.nonfinite_policy: not lexical literals; use Float32/Float64 static nan and positiveInfinity members

candidate_scanner.trigger: an ASCII decimal digit in CODE mode
ordered_decision: 1 consume a radix prefix when present, then consume the maximal adjacent ASCII alphanumeric/underscore digit-suffix candidate rather than stopping at the last valid radix digit

2 for decimal candidates consume a dot only when followed by a decimal digit; then consume the decimal fraction, optional e/E exponent marker, optional exponent sign, exponent candidate, and adjacent suffix candidate
3 for radix candidates include an adjacent dotted p/P-exponent spelling in the same candidate only when lookahead finds the p/P marker; otherwise dot begins ordinary member syntax
4 validate radix digits, underscore positions, required fraction/exponent digits, suffix kind, and the radix-float prohibition against the whole candidate
5 on failure emit exactly one mapped lexer diagnostic spanning the whole candidate and emit no valid numeric prefix tokens

6 only after successful validation emit exactly one most-specific token kind according to successful_token_emission; parser terminals may match its declared lexical supertypes, but no second co-spanning token is emitted; an immediately attached [ is then reclassified by the measure-opener rule

cases.predicate: valid decimal fraction, exponent, or float-suffixed candidate

successful_token_emission.static_int_terminal_law: StaticIntLiteral matches only the DecimalIntegerToken concrete kind; radix prefix, integer suffix, decimal point, exponent, or float suffix prevents that kind

candidate_scanner.member_dot_disambiguation: 1.foo is NumericLiteralToken(1) plus MemberSuffix; 0x1.fp3 is one rejected radix-float candidate because p3 lookahead closes the radix-float signature

whole_pattern_annotation.contract: the field constrains the independently evaluated subject before Pattern admission and never creates a second top-level TypedBindingPattern or runtime type test

closed_union_typed_binder_elaboration.precondition: refutable Pattern owner and normalized subject is a closed Union and TypeRef is exactly one declared alternative identity
closed_union_typed_binder_elaboration.flow_result: arm-local Phi contains only the selected alternative; declared semantic type is unchanged

flow_proof_environment.name: Phi
flow_proof_environment.join: intersection of facts on all incoming edges

concurrency_frontend_contract.message_send_owner: MessageSuffix; reserved spawn selector is recognized in HIR without a second syntax owner

message_hir_result_shapes.request_await_order: extract Task<T> from Result, then apply explicit await

cancellation_phase_split.before_commit: abort, sender retains owners, no channel_sequence, Cancellation is not ActorMessageError
cancellation_phase_split.after_commit: message remains actor-owned and admission Result is not rewritten

concurrency_frontend_contract.await_owner: the existing prefix await operator only

control_frontend_contract.try_statement: try Block followed by one-or-more catch clauses with optional finally, or finally only
control_frontend_contract.at_try_expression: @try ValueBody followed by one-or-more value catches with optional finally, or finally only
control_frontend_contract.guard_cardinality: zero or one per admitting owner
control_frontend_contract.parenless_call_exception: one AtomicCallArgument followed by exactly one ClosureExpr

parser_commitments.lookahead: attached map/set/mut/NumericArray/bytes payload; obsolete-prefixed-collection is never a current owner

parser_commitments.canonical_valueless_terminal_return: omit final return with no value

dynamic_unsafe_quarantine_scope_msp.reason: authority, provenance, escape, suspension and backend-equivalence proofs remain open

enum_declaration_order_ord_derivation.reason: CE-E-P1-007 and TCC gates remain open; current EnumDecl and intrinsic comparison glyph routing are unchanged

enum_case_display_mapping.reason: the enum-owned token, restricted template calculus, witness manifest, diagnostics, and execution evidence remain open

enum_exact_variant_subset_alias.reason: exact-variant identity, associated alias ownership, subset-pattern judgment, API residue, and execution evidence remain open

accepted_surface_families_current.field_punning: ${ id, name } and source!{ id, name } expand to same-name labeled entries
accepted_surface_families_current.enum_case_commas: same-line enum case list separated by commas
accepted_surface_families_current.pattern_controls: if let / while let / for let transactional bindings

removed_surface_contracts_current.current_replacement: map[index] or an explicit Map API
ordinary recursive def; optimization is backend-only
